lighting: side-lit shallow macro with skimming shadows, small flash glints on glossy defects, and bright cropped media flares at seam junctions
object_inventory: a smaller collision cluster of apertures and chipped labels
branching route seams with corner nodes
partial image crops entering from edges
gloss defects that behave like tiny living ponds
negative_constraints: no legible words or interface labels inside the image
no dashboard, desk, room, cabinet, shelf, gallery wall, or card grid
do not copy the unavailable visual reference subject literally
avoid poster-wall paste-up, ceramic plinth, nocturnal archive field, room section, observatory, or pale herbarium repetition
source anchors must appear as physical marks, cuts, apertures, seams, grains, or edge interruptions
no equal-weight grid of source objects
no literal depiction of the source reference image
